# MileClear
> The UK mileage tracker with unlimited free automatic tracking and HMRC-native tax calculations. Built for gig workers, delivery drivers, and the self-employed. (Last updated June 2026.)

MileClear automatically records your business drives with ClearTrack, its rebuilt GPS detection engine, and works out your HMRC-allowable mileage deduction at the correct rate for each trip. Unlike most rivals, automatic tracking is unlimited and free — there is no trip cap on the free tier. It is UK-built and HMRC-native: it applies the Approved Mileage Allowance Payment (AMAP) rates, the 10,000-mile threshold, and platform tagging for UK gig apps.

## Key Facts
- Platform: iOS (iPhone/iPad), live on the App Store. Android is on the roadmap.
- Price: Free with UNLIMITED automatic trip tracking (no monthly trip cap). Pro is £4.99/month or £44.99/year for HMRC exports, Self Assessment tooling, earnings analytics, and Open Banking.
- HMRC AMAP rates (cars and vans): 55p per mile for the first 10,000 business miles, then 25p per mile, for the 2026-27 tax year onwards. The rate rose from 45p to 55p on 6 April 2026 — the first increase since 2011. Motorbikes are 24p per mile flat; bicycles 20p. MileClear automatically uses the correct rate for each trip based on its date, so older trips stay at 45p.
- UK tax year: 6 April to 5 April; the 10,000-mile counter resets on 6 April each year.
- Target audience: UK gig-economy drivers (Uber, Deliveroo, Just Eat, Amazon Flex, Stuart, Gophr, DPD, Yodel, Evri), self-employed tradespeople and field workers, and PAYE employees claiming business mileage.

## What makes MileClear different
- Unlimited free automatic tracking — competitors typically cap free users at 20–40 trips a month.
- UK/HMRC-native: AMAP rates, the 10,000-mile two-tier split, Mileage Allowance Relief for employees, and per-platform tagging built in (most rivals are US-first).
- ClearTrack detection engine: catches every drive on its own, including short one- and two-mile trips, and keeps recording when the app is closed or in your pocket.
- Offline-first: trips are saved on-device first, then synced, so a weak signal never loses a journey.
- Making Tax Digital (MTD ITSA) tooling for sole traders is in development.

## Features
- ClearTrack automatic GPS trip detection with background recording
- HMRC mileage deduction calculator (2026-27 55p rates, tax-year aware)
- Business/personal classification with saved-location auto-tagging
- Live Activity + Dynamic Island showing a trip as it records
- Shift mode with per-platform earnings tracking and live hourly-rate earnings
- PDF and CSV exports, plus a Self Assessment (SA103) wizard
- Business expenses tracking with a live tax estimate
- UK fuel prices from 8,300+ government-mandated stations
- Open Banking earnings sync, achievements, streaks, and weekly goals
